story.iWant: to create variations of my prompts with modifications
story.soThat: I can refine responses without losing conversation context
story.tasks: - Add "Create Variation" button to user messages - Implement prompt variation modal/input pre-filled with original prompt - Handle attachment management (carry forward, add/remove) - Implement createPromptVariation() in ThreadService with branch limit validation - Handle errors gracefully (branch limit, API failures)

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: "Create Variation" button visible on user messages only (not assistant) (TM §3.1)
Clicking "Create Variation" opens input with original prompt pre-filled (TM §3.1)
Original attachments shown as editable chips (ARCH §3.2)
User can remove/add attachments before submitting (ARCH §3.2)
Kept attachments use shared fileId references, not copies (ARCH §3.2)
User can edit prompt text before submitting (TM §3.1)
Clear error message when branch limit reached (TM §3.3)
Prompt variation creates new message with correct parentMessageId and branchIndex

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Enhanced signature: submit(threadId, parentMessageId, prompt, branchIndex?) validates branch limit (max 9 siblings), auto-assigns branchIndex, creates user message with tree metadata, assembles context, submits to AI service.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: BranchLimitCheck interface: {parentMessageId, existingBranches, canCreateBranch, errorMessage}. Enforces maximum 9 variation branches per message.

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: User clicks Create Variation → Edit prompt → Validate branch limit (max 9) → Create branch with correct parentMessageId and branchIndex → Submit to AI → Update UI

doc.title: Epic 2 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: parentMessageId: string | null (null for root), branchIndex: number (0=original, 1-9=variations)

artifact.reason: Existing thread service - needs createPromptVariation() method with branch validation
Existing input component - needs prompt variation pre-fill logic
Existing message component - needs 'Create Variation' button added
Message interface with parentMessageId and branchIndex fields

story-context.constraints: - **Desktop Implementation:** Desktop-only (Electron + Svelte). NOT backend Moku API. - **Branch Limit:** Maximum 9 variation branches per message (branchIndex 0-9). Enforce client-side before API call. - **Error Handling:** Throw error "Maximum variation branches reached (max: 9)" if limit exceeded. Show toast notification. - **Attachment References:** Carried-forward attachments use same fileId (no duplication), new attachments uploaded separately. - **Dependency on E2-S1:** Message tree data model must be implemented first (parentMessageId, branchIndex fields).

interface.name: ThreadService.createPromptVariation()
interface.signature: createPromptVariation(messageId: string, modifiedPrompt: string, attachments: Attachment[]): Promise<Message> - Validates branch limit, creates prompt variation with parentMessageId set to parent of original message, assigns next branchIndex

interface.name: PromptVariationButton.svelte
interface.signature: Component that renders 'Create Variation' button on user messages, triggers prompt variation modal with pre-filled prompt

interface.name: validateBranchLimit()
interface.signature: validateBranchLimit(parentMessageId: string): Promise<boolean> - Returns true if can create branch, false if limit reached

tests.standards: Use vitest for unit tests. Test 'Create Variation' button appears on user messages only. Test branch limit validation: create 9 variations successfully, 10th throws error. Test prompt pre-fill with original content. Test attachment carry-forward with shared fileId references. Test error toast on branch limit.

test.idea: Unit test: Render user message, verify 'Create Variation' button visible. Render assistant message, verify no button.
Unit test: Click 'Create Variation' button, verify input field populated with original prompt text, focused
Unit test: Create variation with attachments, verify original attachments shown as chips with remove buttons, can add new attachments
Unit test: Carried-forward attachment uses same fileId (verify no duplication in attachment array)
Integration test: Create 9 variations (branchIndex 0-9), attempt 10th, verify error 'Maximum variation branches reached'
Integration test: Prompt variation creates message with parentMessageId = original's parent, branchIndex = next available index
E2E test: Click 'Create Variation', edit prompt, submit, verify new branch appears in UI with modified content
